name: GT-hyp
source: STATED HYPOTHESES of lem-cstar-sa-to-epsjb (given as the lemma's premises, not derived): (H1) F:B(H)->B(H) is a unital completely positive (UCP) map; (H2) F is eta-idempotent: ||F^2-F||_cb <= eta with eta<1/4; (H3) Ftilde=theta(2F-1) is the spectral idempotent of F (Kitaev's construction, GT-tildePhi-props applied to F); (H4) B=Im Ftilde=Ker(1-Ftilde) carries the Choi-Effros product X*Y=Ftilde(XY); (H5) for X,Y in B_sa the symmetrized product is XoY=(1/2)(X*Y+Y*X). The role 'Phi' in the cited Kitaev externals is played by THIS map F. C denotes a universal dimension-free constant (independent of H, possibly changing line to line).
